## Embeddable block

Typical page: 4-6 panels. One dominant, supporting transitionals, one
rhythmic. Page-turn reveals reserved for genuine beats (no more than
one every four pages). Splash budget: 1-2 per chapter.

## Clauses

- Detail-density differential — every page has visual hierarchy, never
  uniform density.
- Splash budget is small — splashes lose impact when overused.
